message.content:
@startuml
actor "Crapchat user" as User1
participant "Another Crapchat\nuser" as OtherUser
box "" #LightBlue2
  participant "Crapchat REST API" as RestAPI
end box
database "Crapchat storage" as Storage

== Search user ==
activate User1
RestAPI ->+ IdentityProvider : HTTP request with search query
IdentityProvider -->- RestAPI : HTTP response with list of users
deactivate IdentityProvider
RestAPI <-- User1 : HTTP POST request with array of users
deactivate User1

frame SendFollowRequest {
    activate User1
    note right of User1: Clicks follow button
    
    ' This part seems to be missing in your original sequence but implied by context
    RestAPI <-# User1 : HTTP OK response 
} 

@enduml
